description: CompositionPurple printed top made of 100% viscose, has a V-neck with gathers below the neckline and short sleeves FittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyUse mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)Do not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeDo not iron on printEthnic fused with oodles of attitude results in this stylish top from jealous 21. The gathers just below the neckline makes it an ideal party wear, when combined with slim Fit denims and jazzy wedges, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
